titleStmt.title: SII 27.93: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 93. (A.R. No. 545 of 1929-30.) PADUVARI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the field about two furlongs to the south east of the Roman-catholic church.

This record, with the latter portion of which being completely damaged, registers a gift of land in Hariharapura of Chikkanakēri made after purchase from the nāḍu and naḍagi of Bayidūr, by the seṭṭikāṟa of Bayidūr, to Viṭhappa and Māyaṇṇa, sons of Mallappa of Gautam-gōtra, probably on behalf god Senēśvara.
It is dated Śaka 1344 (current), Plava, Kārttika śu. 1, Monday corresponding to 1421 A.D., October 27.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
harērllīlā varāhasya daṁṣṭrā daṁḍassapātuvaḥ hēmādri kaḷaśā yatra dhātrī chchatra śriyaṁ dadhau
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śubhamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē
trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu
1344 neya varttamāna plava saṁvatsara kārttika śu 1 sō śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣege tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa catussamudrādhipa ti śrīvīra pra
tāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ sakalasāṁbrājyavanāḷu kālada
lu Avara nirūpadiṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna śaṁkaradēva Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu pratipā
lisuva kāladalu śrīmatu bayidūra halaruseṭṭikāṟaru samastaru gautama gōtrada
mallappagaḷa makkaḷu viṭhappagaḷu māyaṁṇagaḷige koṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare nāu naṁ
ma sēnēśvara dēvarige bayidūranāḍu naḍagiyaru samastara kayyalu tatkālōcita krayadānavā
gi koṁḍubaṁda dēvasvada cikkanakēriya hariharapurada catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu
haḷḷa sāliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hoḷeyiṁ māvine Agaradiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kavaṇa
kkana Agaradiṁ viṭhṭhalaseṭṭiya bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu holeya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁda
ṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīme yiṁdoḷage māḍi koṁbaṁtā bāḷu Āgara tōṭa Ā bāḷanōvana
kaṟiya mūḍaṇa hari Āgarake saluva tuṁba tōḍumane yoḷagāgi Alli
yēnu nidhinikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāma siddha sādhya Aṣṭabhōga tēja sāṁmya sahavāgi nāu
sahiraṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpūrvaka
damaged
krōdhisaṁvatsarada
Ayivattu
sahavāgi
yama tettu niṁma saṁtāna saṁtāna
niṁma sahavāgi niṁma
dēvasvava kaṭṭe Avarige nāyiru mūla
seṭṭikāṟaru samastaru koṭṭa
koṭṭaru kayikoṟateyāgi
A dēvasvava
ṁnyāyava
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
